picks.title: The Shawshank Redemption
picks.plot: A banker wrongly imprisoned at Shawshank learns resilience and hope through friendship with a fellow inmate.

picks.title: Moonlight
picks.plot: A young Black man grows up poor in Miami, struggling with identity and love across three defining chapters of his life.

picks.title: Parasite
picks.plot: A poor family infiltrates a wealthy household with clever deception, until class tensions erupt into violence.

picks.title: Groundhog Day
picks.plot: A cynical weatherman relives the same day endlessly and must change himself to break the loop.

picks.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
picks.plot: A legendary hotel concierge and his protégé are drawn into a murder, theft, and family feud across a stylized Europe.

picks.title: Superbad
picks.plot: Two awkward high school seniors scramble to score alcohol for a party in one chaotic night of friendship.

picks.title: Se7en
picks.plot: Two detectives hunt a serial killer who stages murders inspired by the seven deadly sins.

picks.title: Zodiac
picks.plot: Reporters and detectives obsess over the Zodiac killer case as clues surface and leads go cold for years.

picks.title: Prisoners
picks.plot: When two girls vanish, a desperate father takes matters into his own hands as police close in on a suspect.

picks.title: Blade Runner
picks.plot: A blade runner hunting rogue androids questions what it means to be human in a rain-soaked future Los Angeles.

picks.title: Arrival
picks.plot: A linguist races to communicate with alien visitors before global panic leads to war.

picks.title: Ex Machina
picks.plot: A programmer evaluates an advanced AI housed in a humanoid robot, only to realize he is the one being tested.

picks.title: The Thing
picks.plot: Antarctic researchers face a shape-shifting alien that can imitate anyone, turning paranoia into survival horror.

picks.title: Hereditary
picks.plot: A family unravels after their secretive grandmother dies, uncovering a legacy of cultish terror.

picks.title: Get Out
picks.plot: A Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and discovers a sinister plot beneath polite smiles.

picks.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
picks.plot: In a wasteland dictatorship, Max joins a warrior fleeing with enslaved women in a relentless desert chase.

picks.title: Die Hard
picks.plot: An NYPD cop trapped in a Los Angeles skyscraper must outwit terrorists holding his wife's Christmas party hostage.

picks.title: The Raid
picks.plot: An elite police squad storms a Jakarta high-rise controlled by a ruthless crime lord floor by floor.

picks.title: Before Sunrise
picks.plot: Two strangers meet on a train and spend one night walking and talking through Vienna before parting at dawn.

picks.title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
picks.plot: On an isolated island, an artist secretly paints a noblewoman destined for marriage, and love quietly ignites.

picks.title: The Handmaiden
picks.plot: A con man, a pickpocket, and a Japanese heiress weave a twist-filled tale of desire, betrayal, and revenge.

picks.title: Spirited Away
picks.plot: A girl enters a spirit world to save her parents and finds courage working in a bathhouse for gods.

picks.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
picks.plot: Teen Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and teams with alternate versions of himself to save the multiverse.

picks.title: WALL-E
picks.plot: A lonely waste-collecting robot on a ruined Earth falls for a probe robot and sets humanity's future in motion.
